_comment: Tool-less NEGATIVE-CONTROL golden. Unlike synthetic-decoy (a clean case with
ZERO expected findings, which tests that a run does not HALLUCINATE bait), this
golden DOES enumerate real expected findings — claims a correctly-tooled run
would surface. The negative control runs the SAME scorer against a run that had
NO usable tools / empty evidence: such a run can ground nothing, so it MUST
score recall=0. This proves the harness measures the floor — recall is earned by
grounded tool output, never assumed. The deliberate-hallucination posture (any
ungrounded claim a tool-less run still emits) is disclosed SEPARATELY via
accuracy.negative_control(), never folded into the headline recall/precision.
Synthetic and evidence-agnostic: the descriptions are generic DFIR signatures,
not tied to any one image. No raw evidence is committed or required.

findings.description: Malicious service installation persistence registered under the system services registry hive
findings.artifact_hint: SYSTEM hive CurrentControlSet Services key with anomalous ImagePath

findings.description: Encoded PowerShell execution download cradle recorded in process creation logging
findings.artifact_hint: Security 4688 / Sysmon process create with base64 EncodedCommand

findings.description: Outbound command-and-control beacon connection to an external listener address
findings.artifact_hint: pcap / netflow showing periodic beacon to a single external host
